prompt: A beautiful young East Asian woman with long dark hair in a messy elegant bun, sitting comfortably in a white ergonomic office chair in a cozy feminine home office. She is wearing a soft cream-colored off-shoulder knit sweater and matching beige lounge pants, smiling gently while looking down at a smartphone in her hands. She is at a white desk with an open laptop, pink notebook, pens, perfume bottles, and fresh pink roses. Behind her are white floating shelves decorated with books, Vogue and Dior fashion magazines, candles, string lights, and aesthetic decor. A pink bed is partially visible in the background. Warm, soft golden lighting with bokeh effect. Large elegant glowing text overlay in the upper part: “THE BEST TIME TO DO IT IS NOW! SOMETIMES LATER BECOMES NEVER!” with sparkles, hearts, and stars. Cinematic lifestyle photography style, ultra-realistic, warm cozy atmosphere, soft lighting, highly detailed, smooth skin texture, premium fabric details, 8k masterpiece, photorealistic, motivational and aesthetic vibe.
